channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by OGB, 11–16 March 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
27 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by OGB, 11–16 March 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/polish_ep_polls/2026-03-16-OGB.html
